name: organization-switcher
title: Organization Switcher
description: A Better Auth organization switcher backed by the central Krakstack Auth client, with localized organization profile metadata and organization API keys.
docs:
## Overview

`organization-switcher` provides an organization-aware dropdown for apps using Krakstack Auth as the central identity provider. It uses `authClient` so the active organization, memberships, organization metadata, and organization API keys stay scoped to the central auth service.

## Features

- Central Krakstack Auth organization list and active organization state
- Create organizations and auto-generate slugs
- Switch between organizations
- Edit the active organization's canonical name and slug
- Store localized public profile data in `metadata.translations`
- Locale editing selector registered as `editing-locale-switcher`
- Localized organization name, logo, contact email, and location fields
- Manage organization-scoped API keys
- Configurable unauthenticated render slot
- Localized menu and form labels

## Usage

```tsx
import { OrganizationSwitcher } from "@krak-stack/auth";

<OrganizationSwitcher side="bottom" />
```

Set `VITE_KRAKSTACK_AUTH_URL` to your central auth origin, for example `http://localhost:3001`. The central auth server must have Better Auth's organization and API-key plugins enabled.
